question: How long had I been taking guitar lessons when I bought the new guitar amp?
reasoning_summary: User stated taking weekly guitar lessons for six weeks as of 2023-05-25, implying start date 2023-04-13. User stated buying new guitar amp two weeks ago as of 2023-05-25, implying purchase date 2023-05-11. Difference is 28 days.
adaptive_choice_reason: same answer with stronger specialist support
